description: WOS-443 defender active.hero.defense.up and active.hero.attack.down membership fixture. minxxx attacks WIP; WIP defends with Sergey full current kit and infantry-only Heroic troops. Defenders Edge should route to the defender denominator bucket and Weaken should route enemy attack down as an attacker-side denominator factor. Deterministic; run with wos443_control_minxxx_attacks_wip_infantry_nc in the same stats batch.
